title: Configure SQLDelight
description: Write the build.gradle.kts configuration for a KMP project with SQLDelight support for Android, iOS, and Desktop.

hints.text: Each platform needs its own driver dependency
Database name becomes the generated class name

testCases.description: All platform drivers should be configured
testCases.expectedBehavior: Android, iOS, and Desktop drivers are added

instructions: Write the code according to the description.
